calendar.matters:
SETTING OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR CHANGE OF GENDER AND ISSUANCE OF NEW BIRTH CERTIFICATE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing Change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Victory Nguyen Le present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Declaration of Sworn Physician on file. Court Ordered certified copy of Decree Changing Name to be attached to Original Petition.

No objections to the proposed change of gender and issuance of New Birth Certificate were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations of the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of gender from male to female and issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Order for Change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate signed by the court.
